blocks.html_en:
When the last day's news were about other people shot dead by ICE without a plausible reason, it is hard to take seriously discussions about human rights abuse coming from USA. It is hard to imagine a more serious abuse than being randomly killed on the street, while walking or driving during your normal daily routine.

Unfortunately, there are very few, if any, countries remaining where human rights abuses are not frequent, so mentioning them in unrelated technology discussions has become non-relevant.

sentences.en: When the last day's news were about other people shot dead by ICE without a plausible reason, it is hard to take seriously discussions about human rights abuse coming from USA.
sentences.zh: 当最后一天的新闻是关于其他人在没有合理理由的情况下被 ICE 枪杀时，很难认真对待来自美国的侵犯人权的讨论。

sentences.en: It is hard to imagine a more serious abuse than being randomly killed on the street, while walking or driving during your normal daily routine.Unfortunately, there are very few, if any, countries remaining where human rights abuses are not frequent, so mentioning them in unrelated technology discussions has become non-relevant.
sentences.zh: 很难想象比在日常生活中在街上、走路或开车时被随机杀害更严重的虐待行为了。不幸的是，侵犯人权行为不频繁的国家（如果有的话）也非常少，因此在不相关的技术讨论中提及它们已经变得无关紧要。

blocks.html_en:
It's one of the most annoying.

I have a dishwasher so I do minimal washing up. I don't have a dryer as I air-dry my laundry but I could get one if I wanted to. I have a Roborock although I don't use it much since having a toddler.

But folding laundry is the one chore which still can't be automated. Even cooking itself has become much easier with air fryers etc.

sentences.zh: 这是最烦人的事情之一。我有洗碗机，所以我很少洗碗。

sentences.en: I don't have a dryer as I air-dry my laundry but I could get one if I wanted to.
sentences.zh: 我没有烘干机，因为我要风干衣服，但如果我愿意的话，我可以买一台。

sentences.en: I have a Roborock although I don't use it much since having a toddler.But folding laundry is the one chore which still can't be automated.

sentences.en: Even cooking itself has become much easier with air fryers etc.
sentences.zh: 使用空气炸锅等，甚至烹饪本身也变得更加容易。

blocks.html_en: So is a pasta factory. Today it rolls and forms macaroni, tomorrow it makes bullets. Have you ever wondered why rigatoni are so wide? That's why.

sentences.en: So is a pasta factory.
sentences.zh: 面食工厂也是如此。

sentences.en: Today it rolls and forms macaroni, tomorrow it makes bullets.
sentences.zh: 今天它滚动并形成通心粉，明天它会制造子弹。

sentences.en: Have you ever wondered why rigatoni are so wide?
sentences.zh: 您有没有想过为什么通心粉如此宽？

sentences.en: That's why.
sentences.zh: 这就是原因。

blocks.html_en:
No, not really. The macaroni are formed by squeezing the dough through the openings, while the cartridge cases are made by stretching small metallic disks into cylindrical shape (and then stamping the bottom to make it flat and have a proper rim), so it's impossible to repurpose the pasta-forming machines into the casing-making ones.

But it is an urban legend of sorts, along with "baby strollers with chain tracks instead of wheels", and shows how little most of us know about industrial manufacturing.

sentences.en: No, not really.
sentences.zh: 不，不是真的。

sentences.en: The macaroni are formed by squeezing the dough through the openings, while the cartridge cases are made by stretching small metallic disks into cylindrical shape (and then stamping the bottom to make it flat and have a proper rim), so it's impossible to repurpose the pasta-forming machines into the casing-making ones.But it is an urban legend of sorts, along with "baby strollers with chain tracks instead of wheels", and shows how little most of us know about industrial manufacturing.
sentences.zh: 通心粉是通过将面团从开口中挤压出来而形成的，而弹壳则是通过将小金属盘拉伸成圆柱形（然后将底部冲压成平坦并具有适当的边缘）来制成的，因此不可能将面食成型机重新用作肠衣制作机。但这与“用链轨而不是轮子的婴儿车”一起构成了某种都市传说，并表明我们大多数人对工业制造知之甚少。

sentences.zh: 通心粉是通过将面团从开口中挤压而形成的，而弹壳则是通过将小金属盘拉伸成圆柱形（然后冲压底部使其平坦并具有适当的边缘）来制成的，因此不可能将意大利面成型机重新用于制作肠衣。

blocks.html_en: But it is an urban legend of sorts, along with "baby strollers with chain tracks instead of wheels", and shows how little most of us know about industrial manufacturing.

blocks.html_en: From my skim of their paper, they have gotten robodojo 14% versus previous sota 9%. So its an improvement, but doesnt seem like a reliable model yet, which is fine. I also notice the model becomes worse with more data on the printer refilling task, so thats either a bad run or its a data point against the robustness. The transfer learning results are meaningful. 75% on new complex tasks from <10 hours of demo is really good. I believe this is a 2x improvement over the SOTA. 10 trials per task is standard for these papers but is pretty weak statistically. Memory tasks its weaker at but they have acknowledged it, and I cant see why this arch would have problems w that in the future.

content_html_zh: 我不知道为什么这里的一些评论如此悲观。 看视频的时候我笑得合不拢嘴。 你是说我们终于有了可以洗衣服的机器人了？ 而且这个模型至少和啤酒一样免费？引用歌词/模因，我们曾经祈祷这样的时刻。 这就是机器人技术的用途。HN 上往往存在很多低调（以及一些不那么低调）的反华仇外情绪，因此这也可能是其中的重要组成部分。更像是亲美例外论，任何在其之外（无论是欧盟还是中国）创造的产品的发布都会遭到质疑和质疑。除非某样东西来自日本，否则它就是完美的，任何批评都是因为你不欣赏其独特的文化遗产。一段时间以来，HN 的任何帖子中都没有出现亲美例外论的语气。 最近查看任何帖子，都会发现它非常反资本主义/反美国。他们很可能是有效的利他主义者，高度关注 AGI（目前法学硕士）的风险，担心法学硕士起义和人类灭绝，他们认为这是世界上最严峻的挑战。当他们从对慈善机构进行评级转向提出有关人工智能的恐怖故事时，这个名字很久以前就不再相关了。 “无效的自我主义”对于他们现在的情况来说会更好。我肯定注意到的还不止这些——任何以良好的眼光描绘当前美国的提交内容都会立即被无情地埋葬（你可以查看我提交的例子），而任何甚至远程的“美国坏”方面的内容都会被放在首位。 这实在是一种可悲的状况。您可能会认为这是“美国不好”，评论，但让我们以您发布的美国预期寿命达到历史新高（2024 年）链接为例。这听起来像是一件好事，而且确实如此。
